title: Entity Mount Pathing Behavior
description: Allows the mob to move around on its own while mounted seeking a target to attack. Also will allow an entity to target another entity for an attack.

priority.title: Priority
priority.description:
As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.

Sample values:
• cave_spider: 5
• chicken: 2
• llama: 1

speed_multiplier.title: Speed Multiplier
speed_multiplier.description:
Movement speed multiplier of the mob when using this AI Goal

Sample values:
• cave_spider: 1.25
• chicken: 1.5

target_dist.title: Target Dist
target_dist.description: The distance at which this mob wants to be away from its target

track_target.title: Track Target
track_target.description:
If true, this mob will chase after the target as long as it's a valid target

Sample values:
• cave_spider: true
